nasb.text: For the arrows of the Almighty are within me, Their poison my spirit drinks; The terrors of God are arrayed against me.

esv.text: For the arrows of the Almighty are in me; my spirit drinks their poison; the terrors of God are arrayed against me.

cnv.text: 因為全能者的箭射中我， 我的靈喝盡了箭的毒液， 　神的驚嚇排陣攻擊我。

ccb.text: 因为全能者的箭射中我， 箭毒侵蚀我的灵， 祂使恐惧列队袭来。
